title: Cozy Syrian Flax Eggs Stir-fry
description: A tender and bitter-flavored Syrian dish featuring flax eggs that are slow-cooked for a cozy flavor profile, suitable for the whole30 diet.

ingredients.name: 1 cup soaked flax seeds
ingredients.notes: Soaked in water for at least 4 hours

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add the soaked flax seeds and stir-fry until they turn golden brown and are tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
